title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | May 11, 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Hold; possible surprise move as investment-banker peers jump.
recommendations.detail: Hold definitely; after the recent correction the stock is looking good again. Investment-banker companies are all jumping, so JM could too. Corrected from near 200 and is now stabilising near 140; if it crosses 150 levels a good move could come.

recommendations.note: Coal India subsidiary; only one result so far, definitely hold.
recommendations.detail: This is a recently listed company, a subsidiary related to Coal India. Only one result has come so far, so it must definitely be held.

recommendations.note: Not very positive on agro-chemicals now; monsoon/El Nino risk.
recommendations.detail: Agro-chemical companies with higher raw-material costs will see margins fall; companies with lower raw-material costs will rise. This quarter's performance could be weak because of monsoon and the El Nino effect. So not very positive on agro-chemical companies as of now.

recommendations.note: Top energy pick; ~Rs 1 lakh crore value unlock from subsidiaries in 6 months; slow mover.
recommendations.detail: My energy choice now is NTPC; accumulate it. Two-three subsidiary investments (incl. HURL, alongside Coal India) will see value unlock - maybe about Rs 1 lakh crore over the next six months. It moves slowly, like 2% or 1% (a tortoise), not 10% like other power stocks, but it's one of the best companies in the power sector.

recommendations.note: Preferred EV play; rose well over the past month; buy EV + renewables now.
recommendations.detail: We've been saying for many days, buy Olectra; it rose well over the last one month. There's no other distinct EV stock to buy - if you ask me, combine EV plus renewables and buy now. Adani Power and such have already risen well.

recommendations.note: Some revival after touching bottom; hold for now.
recommendations.detail: For now I'd say hold Trent, because we're seeing some revival in the stock after it touched bottom.

recommendations.note: 100% hold for long term; buy more on dips.
recommendations.detail: 100% hold for the long term, and buy more when dips come. It lags Hitachi Energy / GE Vernova only because companies don't move equally - there are cycles of under- and out-performance; in that segment they are excellent companies.

recommendations.note: Weak, making losses; don't average, wait for turnaround.
recommendations.detail: We're tracking it, but the stock is weak - a chemical-space company that, after re-listing, saw institutional activity rise then fade, and it is now making losses too. Don't average; wait for a turnaround in performance. It's a large company (almost a couple of thousand crores turnover).
